While Josh Jacobs has strongly denied all the charges through his legal team, Ash Kaashh’s recent post has raised eyebrows.

description: China's new AI algorithm, HG-STR, promises to revolutionize drone warfare.  This system enables swarms of drones to autonomously identify and neutralize enemy targets, even in jammed and low-visibility conditions.  Achieving a perfect 100% elimination rate in simulations, it makes critical decisions in milliseconds, offering a glimpse into future autonomous combat.

Microsoft CEO's Copilot ‘confusion fix’ that left employees laughing in townhall
description: Microsoft is reportedly developing a 'super app' to consolidate its confusing array of Copilot AI tools. This unified platform aims to end customer frustration by offering a single destination for various AI assistants, including coding, chat, and collaboration features. The app, expected by summer's end, will allow seamless switching between personal and work accounts, simplifying Microsoft's AI ecosystem.

title: 'Amazon would collapse if run like New York City': Jeff Bezos takes swipe at Mamdani
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has endorsed New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's new government efficiency initiative, COGE. This comes after their public disagreement on taxing the wealthy. Bezos, who previously criticized city spending, now supports Mamdani's plan to make government work smarter, suggesting savings could benefit lower earners.

title: Coco Gauff and Jalen Sera net worth 2026: Inside their growing fortune
description: Coco Gauff and Jalen Sera’s combined net worth in 2026 is estimated at around $36 million. Coco holds most of the wealth through tennis prize money, endorsements, and business ventures. She has earned over $24.3 million in career winnings and works with brands like Rolex and New Balance. Jalen Sera lives privately and focuses mainly on music and creative projects.
